item.text: I‚Äôm going to scan the workspace with `rg` first to locate every `PolicyDenial` construction site and every `AuditSink` impl, then I‚Äôll verify each candidate file with focused `sed -n` reads before listing results.
I found broad matches including benchmark artifacts, so I‚Äôm narrowing to Rust source files only and validating each hit to separate constructors from pattern matches.
I‚Äôve confirmed which current hits are constructors vs readers; next I‚Äôll run a broader variant search (`PolicyDenial {`) to ensure we don‚Äôt miss unqualified constructors.
I‚Äôve identified the `AuditSink` impl blocks; I‚Äôm doing one cross-check with `git grep` for `PolicyDenial {` so we can be confident no constructor site is missed.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` directly via `sink.emit(...)` when a tool call is blocked by the allowlist.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes `let denial = LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` and emits it (`self.inner.emit(&denial)`) when `EnforcedAuditSink` intercepts a disallowed `ToolCallRequested`.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
